attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WIRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WIRBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WIRBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WIRBM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WIRBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WIRBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WIRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
 WIRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WIRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 WIRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WIRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 WIRBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE,
 WIRBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 WIRBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 WIRBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 WIRBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 WIRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WIRBM.CANCELLED_FLG,
 WIRBM.CANCEL_CODE,
 WIRBM.ACQUISITION_FLG,
 WIRBM.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 WIRBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 WIRBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 WIRBM.OVERLAY_FLG,
 WIRBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRBM.CHARGES_FLG,
 WIRBM.SALESREP_FLG,
 WIRBM.MISC_FLG,
 WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG,
 WIRBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRBM.REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRBM.RMA_FLG,                
 WIRBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,
 WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 WIRBM.CONVERSION_RT,
 WIRBM.CONVERSION_DT,
 WIRBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
 WIRBM.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
 WIRBM.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
 WIRBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
 WIRBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
 WIRBM.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,
 WIRBM.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,
 WIRBM.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
 WIRBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 WIRBM.DV_DEAL_ID,
 WIRBM.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
 WIRBM.DV_BOOKED_DT,
 WIRBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 WIRBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 'A' AS DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG, 
 'N' AS RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
 WIRBM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,          
 WIRBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  ,
 WIRBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,   
 WIRBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
 WIRBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,  
 WIRBM.DV_FMV_FLG,
 WIRBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,    
 WIRBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,      
 WIRBM.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION    ,          
 WIRBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG    ,             
 WIRBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT  ,        
 WIRBM.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT ,
 WIRBM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 /*ADDED BELOW ATTRIBUTES AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
 WIRBM.DSV_FLG,
 /*ADDED BELOW ATTRIBUTES AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
 WIRBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,  /* OA-Q1FY16 */
 WIRBM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE, 
 WIRBM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS DML_TYPE  ,
 WIRBM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF sep 27TH CD RELEASE */
 WIRBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 WIRBM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/   
WIRBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY ,
 WIRBM.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW 4 COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 WIRBM.XCAT_FLG,
 WIRBM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 WIRBM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 WIRBM.ELA_FLG
 ,WIRBM.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,WIRBM.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
,WIRBM.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
/*,WIRBM.DV_TOTAL_CNTRCT_VAL_USD_AMT    */
,WIRBM.DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT
,WIRBM.DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
,WIRBM.DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
,WIRBM.DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
,WIRBM.DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,WIRBM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD  /*  added as part of June29th2017 */ 
 ,WIRBM.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18 PA */
 ,WIRBM.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,WIRBM.POB_TYPE_CD
,WIRBM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS DV_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASMT_KEY,  /* Added as part of  Q1FY18 Restatements*/
WIRBM.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
WIRBM.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
WIRBM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY, /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */

/*Added as part of EDW_FY19 Nov08Rel CR11701*/
DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT,
DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT,
DV_ENRICHED_CONTRACT_DURATION,
DV_ENRICHMENT_RULE_DESC,
/* added as part of 10th March release*/
ENRICHED_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
DV_ENRICHED_UNK_END_CUST_RULE_DESC
,WIRBM.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,WIRBM.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE 
,WIRBM.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
,WIRBM.DV_INV_DTM
,WIRBM.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,WIRBM.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,WIRBM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
,WIRBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
,WIRBM.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,WIRBM.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,WIRBM.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,WIRBM.DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG,
COALESCE(ENDCUST.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,(RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)) AS BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
,WIRBM.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,WIRBM.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE_INCR WIRBM
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST
ON WIRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 WHERE WIRBM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG IN ('I','U')
 AND WIRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='XAAS'

SELECT
 WIRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WIRBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WIRBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WIRBM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WIRBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WIRBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
 COALESCE(CASE WHEN REST_BKG.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY<0 THEN NULL 
   ELSE POS_ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END,WIRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 CASE WHEN SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
   THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 /*RANDOMIZATION FOR -777*/
   ELSE COALESCE(COALESCE(CASE WHEN REST_BKG.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY<0 THEN NULL 
   ELSE  POS_ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END,WIRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY),(RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)) END AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
 REST_BKG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 REST_BKG.SALES_REP_NUM AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 WIRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WIRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 WIRBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE,
 WIRBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 WIRBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 WIRBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 WIRBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 WIRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WIRBM.CANCELLED_FLG,
 WIRBM.CANCEL_CODE,
 WIRBM.ACQUISITION_FLG,
 WIRBM.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 WIRBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 WIRBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 WIRBM.OVERLAY_FLG,
 WIRBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRBM.CHARGES_FLG,
 WIRBM.SALESREP_FLG,
 WIRBM.MISC_FLG,
 WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG,
 WIRBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRBM.REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRBM.RMA_FLG,                
 (WIRBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT* COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)   AS  TRADE_IN_AMOUNT,  
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 (WIRBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,
 (WIRBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,
 (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 WIRBM.CONVERSION_RT,
 WIRBM.CONVERSION_DT,
 WIRBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRBM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
 WIRBM.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
 WIRBM.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
 WIRBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
 WIRBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
 WIRBM.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,
 WIRBM.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,
 WIRBM.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) AS BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
 WIRBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 WIRBM.DV_DEAL_ID,
 WIRBM.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
 WIRBM.DV_BOOKED_DT,
 WIRBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 WIRBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 'R' AS DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG, 
 'N' AS RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
 WIRBM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,          
 WIRBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  ,
 WIRBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY   ,
 WIRBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
 WIRBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
 WIRBM.DV_FMV_FLG,
 WIRBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,    
 WIRBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,      
 WIRBM.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION    ,          
 WIRBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG    ,             
   WIRBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT  * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
  ,WIRBM.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT  * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,   
 /*ADDED ABOVE ATTRIBUTES AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 WIRBM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 /*ADDED BELOW ATTRIBUTES AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
 WIRBM.DSV_FLG,
 /*ADDED BELOW ATTRIBUTES AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
 WIRBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,  /* OA-Q1FY16 */
 WIRBM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE, 
 WIRBM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS DML_TYPE ,
 WIRBM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF sep 27TH CD RELEASE */   
 WIRBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 WIRBM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/  
 /* XAAS BGM CHANGES
WIRBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY ,
 WIRBM.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 WIRBM.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
 */
 CASE WHEN WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
         CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)IS NOT NULL  THEN     
                 COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)
             WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL THEN
                 COALESCE(L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,-999) 
                 ELSE -999 
         END 
 ELSE -999 END TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
 
 ( ( CASE WHEN WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'  AND WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
   THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)IS NOT NULL  
       THEN  
     CAST( (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*
       (CASE WHEN DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG='Y' THEN WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ELSE WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT END)/100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
    WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
    THEN
     CAST( (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
      (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
    ELSE 0
   END 
  ELSE 0
  END )     * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100)  ) DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 
 ( ( CASE WHEN WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0  AND MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL
  THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
    THEN  
     CAST( ( (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*
      (CASE WHEN DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG='Y' THEN WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ELSE WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT END)/100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
    WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
    THEN
     CAST( /* WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT **/
     COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) *
      (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT))/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
    ELSE 0
   END 
  ELSE 0
  END  )     * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100)  )  DV_BGM_COST_AMOUNT,
 
 CASE WHEN (WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND 
 COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
 THEN ( COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)  
    * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) )
 ELSE 0
 END AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT ,

 /*ADDED THE BELOW 4 COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 WIRBM.XCAT_FLG,
 WIRBM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 WIRBM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 WIRBM.ELA_FLG
,(WIRBM.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,(WIRBM.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT    *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100)) LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,(WIRBM.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
/*,(WIRBM.DV_TOTAL_CNTRCT_VAL_USD_AMT  *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))  DV_TOTAL_CNTRCT_VAL_USD_AMT*/
,(WIRBM.DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT  *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))  DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT
,(WIRBM.DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT
,(WIRBM.DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
,(WIRBM.DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
,(WIRBM.DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT*(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,WIRBM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD  /*  added as part of June29th2017 */ 
 ,(WIRBM.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT*(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18 PA */
,WIRBM.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,WIRBM.POB_TYPE_CD
,WIRBM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
 REST_BKG.RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT_KEY AS DV_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASMT_KEY, /* Added as part of  Q1FY18 Restatements*/
 /* REBATE BGM NET START */
((CASE WHEN WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
	THEN
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
			THEN 	
				CAST( (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)  * WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
					)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
			WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,0) <> 0
			THEN
				CAST( (WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
					(COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )		
			ELSE  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
		END 
	ELSE  0
 END) * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) ) DV_BKG_REBATE,

CASE WHEN (WIRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND DV_BKG_REBATE <> 0 AND 
COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
THEN (COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*DV_BKG_REBATE,0) 
* (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) )
ELSE 0
END AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
/* REBATE BGM NET END */
WIRBM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY, /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */

/*Added as part of EDW_FY19 Nov08Rel CR11701*/
DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT,
DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT,
DV_ENRICHED_CONTRACT_DURATION,
DV_ENRICHMENT_RULE_DESC,
/* added as part of 10th March release*/
ENRICHED_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
DV_ENRICHED_UNK_END_CUST_RULE_DESC
,WIRBM.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,WIRBM.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,(WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,(WIRBM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
WIRBM.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE , /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
WIRBM.DV_INV_DTM,
(WIRBM.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT  *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
WIRBM.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM,
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
(WIRBM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT  *(COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100))  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT,
WIRBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
WIRBM.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
WIRBM.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WIRBM.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WIRBM.DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN REST_BKG.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY<0 THEN NULL ELSE REST_BKG.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY END,ENDCUST.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,(RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1)) AS BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
,WIRBM.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,WIRBM.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE_INCR  WIRBM
 INNER  JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT REST_BKG  
 ON    REST_BKG.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=WIRBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
 AND  REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE =    WIRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 AND WIRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 AND WIRBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT=REST_BKG.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT
 AND REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE='XAAS'
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON WIRBM.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY  

LEFT JOIN (SELECT BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,END_CUSTOMER_KEY,BRANCH_PRIMARY_NAME FROM
  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER --WHERE CUSTOMER_TYPE NOT IN ('ACQ')
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC,END_CUSTOMER_KEY DESC)=1) END_CUST
  ON REST_BKG.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY=END_CUST.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
 
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT END_CUSTOMER_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST ) POS_ENDCUST 
 ON END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=POS_ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST
 ON WIRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY HIER
 ON WIRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS
 ON TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                    = WIRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND TSS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
 AND TSS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS'
  AND TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
 AND TSS.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'
 
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS1
 ON TSS1.PRODUCT_KEY                    = WIRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND TSS1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
 AND TSS1.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS'
  AND TSS1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
 AND TSS1.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L4_TSD
 ON L4_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
 AND L4_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L3_TSD
 ON L3_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
 AND L3_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L2_TSD
 ON L2_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
 AND L2_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L1_TSD
 ON L1_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
 AND L1_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (
 SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
 (SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
     CASE WHEN PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = 12 THEN (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT+1)*100+1 ELSE PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1  END AS END_DATE
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDATE
     )PDATE
 WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
 AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
 AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD'
 )MCR   
 ON WIRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 AND  WIRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   

 WHERE WIRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS' 
 AND INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG = 'R'
 AND REST_BKG.LATEST_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y'
